# Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New capability or behavior
- [ ] Docs / reference update (`references/`, README)
- [ ] Tooling / repo setup

## How it was tested

- [ ] Ran the affected test prompts in `evals/evals.json` and they still stop at the confirmation gate without silently spending credits.
- [ ] Ran at least one real end-to-end scene build with Blender open and the bridge connected (describe what you built).
- [ ] Verified the skill still loads (`SKILL.md` frontmatter valid, no broken reference links).

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out: tradeoffs, follow-ups, or things you were unsure about.
